mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: Rivian sent a one-time code to {email}. Enter it below.

vehicle.title: Vehicle & Entities
vehicle.description: Configure your vehicle and Home Assistant power entities.

data.vehicle_id: Rivian Vehicle ID (find it in the Rivian app or via Developer Tools → States)
data.grid_power_entity: Grid power entity (negative = exporting to grid)
data.home_latitude: Home latitude (auto-filled from HA home zone)
data.powerwall_min_pct: Powerwall % to START diverting solar to car (default 100)
data.powerwall_stop_pct: Powerwall % to STOP diverting — hysteresis floor (default 70)
data.rivian_start_limit: Don't start a new session if Rivian is already above this % (default 80)

error.invalid_auth: Invalid Rivian credentials. Check your email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach Rivian servers. Check your network connection.
error.entity_not_found: Entity not found in Home Assistant. Check the entity ID.

abort.already_configured: This Rivian account is already configured.

data.rivian_start_limit: Rivian % above which new sessions won't start
